title: Case: LLM evaluation platform
focus: Suites, runs, gates, regression detection across teams.

items.label: Chip Huyen — building a GenAI platform
interviewQuestions: How do you prevent teams from over-fitting to the eval suite (Goodhart)?
How do you make releases gate-block on regressions without slowing iteration?
What's the failure mode of an LLM-judge calibrated only against itself?

items.label: Ragas metrics catalog
interviewQuestions: Walk me through Ragas's faithfulness / answer-relevance / context-precision metrics.
When would you supplement Ragas with human eval?
How do you handle disagreement between evaluators?

items.label: Suite / run / gate object model + scoring layer

interviewQuestions: How do you prevent teams from over-fitting to the eval suite (Goodhart)?
